goal: Install V1/V2 governor for ChefFlow urgency spikes and build gating
durable_behavior_seen: ChefFlow needs a non-bypassable V1/V2 gate that captures urgency spikes without turning every idea into immediate code.
skill_gap_seen: No existing skill owned the V1/V2 classification and override gate before builder, Hermes, or swarm-style product work.

validation.skill_validator: node devtools/skill-validator.mjs v1-governor omninet builder software-fundamentals: pass

notes: No product code was changed. Existing unrelated dirty files were preserved.
